{{Quote|How amusing. A Car'das pet hoping to be a hero. Your days end here, Car'das puppet!|Arlem Demonhunter, to a [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] pilot|<ref name="SWG:CA" />}}
'''Arlem Demonhunter''' was a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Ace/Legends|ace]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:CA" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> Demonhunter was a hero of the Blacksun and rumored to have taken on a whole [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] fleet single-handedly. Nevertheless, Demonhunter was killed in the [[Bright Jewel Ribbon]] during the [[Battle of Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Battle of Tansarii Point Station]] by [[Aleas Rans'ery]]'s Car'das forces.<ref name="SWG:CA" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TempBlackSunSpaceComm.jpg|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Arlem Demonhunter.]]
Arlem Demonhunter was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:CA" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Arlem Demonhunter was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:CA" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
